scripts.video:render: npm run video:render:features && npm run video:render:architecture && npm run video:render:journal && npm run video:render:download
scripts.video:still: npm run video:still:features && npm run video:still:architecture && npm run video:still:journal && npm run video:still:download
scripts.video:still:features: node scripts/remotion.mjs still src/index.ts Features render/stills/features.png --frame=150 --overwrite
scripts.video:still:architecture: node scripts/remotion.mjs still src/index.ts Architecture render/stills/architecture.png --frame=150 --overwrite
scripts.video:still:journal: node scripts/remotion.mjs still src/index.ts Journal render/stills/journal.png --frame=150 --overwrite
scripts.video:still:download: node scripts/remotion.mjs still src/index.ts Download render/stills/download.png --frame=150 --overwrite
